campaignGoal: Exercise the every required field without relying on Green Goods campaign copy.
vaultStory: A synthetic deployed Octant vault used only to test portability of manifests and implementation plans.
impactFraming: Synthetic supporters can understand the vault, review the asset and receiver semantics, and manage a position in the target route.
riskNotes: Synthetic data is for dry-run planning only.
No live value movement should use this fixture.

factoryEvidence.name: SyntheticFactory
factoryEvidence.proofLimit: Not a real factory and never valid for create-vault implementation.

campaignCopy: Synthetic transaction-ready campaign copy for a deployed Octant vault.
recipientRoutingSummary: Synthetic recipient routing summary for dry-run planning.

validationCommands: target repo unit tests for readiness and transaction shape
target repo provider adapter tests with mocked proof
target repo browser proof before live value movement

privacy.publicLogPolicy: redact provider sessions, receipt tokens, emails, OTPs, and wallet-specific recovery identifiers

proofLimits: Synthetic fixture proves portability only and must not be used for live transactions.
